title: MAVLink Auth Bypass
summary: [P1] CVE-2026-1579 is a vulnerability in the MAVLink communication protocol that allows for authentication bypass. No patch is currently available. Why now: Newly disclosed vulnerability with potential for widespread impact. (confidence: 0.90)
